summary: Tested 5 major features: Dashboard Tour (9 steps), PDF Bank Statement Parsing, WhatsApp Chatbot, AI Shift Scheduling, and PWA improvements. All 22 backend tests passed. Frontend Dashboard Tour works correctly with 9-step onboarding flow.

minor.issue: Returns 500 for invalid PDF (expected - pdfplumber throws exception for malformed PDFs)

ui_bugs.issue: Tour dialog positioning - when tour highlights lower elements like AI widgets, the Next button may move outside viewport requiring scroll

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 features from backlog/future items are implemented and working: 1) Dashboard Tour has 9 steps and auto-shows on first login, 2) PDF parsing uses pdfplumber at /api/bank-statements/upload, 3) WhatsApp chatbot has webhook and test-command endpoints with commands: help, sales today/week, stock low, expenses today, summary, profit, 4) AI Shift Scheduler analyzes peak hours and generates staff schedules, 5) PWA has offline.html, enhanced sw.js with API caching, and manifest.json with shortcuts

dashboard_tour.details: 9-step interactive onboarding tour working. Steps include: Welcome, navigation menu, AI widgets (Low Stock, Peak Hours, CLV, Profit Trend), Quick Actions, and more.

pdf_bank_statement_parsing.details: Endpoint /api/bank-statements/upload accepts PDF files and uses pdfplumber library. Correctly parses PDF tables and extracts transaction data.

whatsapp_chatbot.details: Webhook at POST /api/whatsapp/webhook working. Test command at POST /api/whatsapp/test-command working. Commands tested: help, sales today, sales week, stock low, expenses today, summary, profit.

ai_shift_scheduling.details: Peak hours analysis at GET /api/schedules/peak-hours/analysis working. Schedule generation at POST /api/schedules/generate working. Schedule retrieval at GET /api/schedules working.

pwa_improvements.details: manifest.json has 3 shortcuts (Quick Entry, POS, Reports). Service worker sw.js has offline support with CACHE_NAME, OFFLINE_CACHE, API_CACHE strategies. offline.html page exists.
